overall.description: First-person exploration of the Afterlife bar from Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks through a neon-lit entrance corridor, briefly observes NPCs at vending machines, passes a security checkpoint, and explores the main bar area featuring a pool table and holographic dancer. The environment features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with green and pink neon lighting, industrial metal architecture, and dense atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance corridor with overhead neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the entrance corridor toward the Afterlife sign

entered.detail: large green neon sign reading 'AFTERLIFE' mounted above the entrance
metal security gates with vertical bars flanking the corridor
illuminated vending machine with orange 'SHWARB' signage
large cylindrical ventilation pipes running along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance to the Afterlife bar, dominated by the iconic green neon sign overhead. The camera moves forward through a narrow industrial corridor with metal grid flooring and green neon strip lighting along the edges, approaching the security gates.

scene_state.functional_zone: vending machine alcove with wall posters

events.description: camera turns right to face the vending machine area and observe NPCs

agents.ego_description: turns to observe NPCs interacting with vending machines in the side alcove

notable_agents.action: character with red mohawk and reflective jacket standing at the NEM vending machine
character browsing items at the SHWARB vending machine

entered.detail: vending machine with pink 'NEM' neon signage and menu display
posters on the concrete wall including one with 'HOMICIDE' text

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a small side alcove featuring vending machines. A character with a distinctive red mohawk stands at the NEM vending machine while another browses nearby. Posters adorn the concrete walls in this dimly lit corner with pink and green neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint transition to main bar

events.description: approaches and passes through the metal security gate into the main bar area
emerges from dark corridor into the brighter main bar with yellow-green ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the security checkpoint and entering the main bar area

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near the access terminal and smoking

entered.detail: metal accordion-style security gate with diagonal cross pattern
illuminated 'AFTERLIFE' sign above the bar counter in the main room
long curved bar with yellow neon lighting and glass facade

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to face forward and approaches a metal security gate where a guard stands smoking. After passing through the gate, the scene transitions into the main bar area where the Afterlife sign is visible above the bar counter, and the lighting shifts to a brighter yellow-green hue.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar area with counter and pool table

events.description: pool table with blood stains comes into view as camera approaches the back area

agents.ego_description: walking through the main bar, passing patrons and approaching the pool table area

notable_agents.action: bartender working behind the illuminated bar counter

entered.detail: large pool table with blood stains on the felt surface and cues resting on top
large cylindrical glass tank with green holographic display inside
benches with blue neon strip lighting underneath where patrons sit

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the main bar area, passing the illuminated bar counter where a bartender works. The environment features glass railings, neon floor lighting, and patrons gathered around. A pool table with blood stains becomes visible as the camera moves deeper into the space, alongside a large holographic display tank.

scene_state.functional_zone: back seating area with performance platform

agents.ego_description: approaching the back seating area where a holographic dancer performs on a platform

notable_agents.action: dancer performing on the illuminated platform in the center of the seating area

entered.detail: raised black platform with blue lighting where the performer dances
large angled windows showing the night cityscape outside with neon lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the back seating area featuring an illuminated platform where a dancer performs. Patrons sit on glowing benches watching the performance, while large windows show the city outside. The area maintains the green neon aesthetic with industrial metal walls and atmospheric fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, industrial entrance corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched main hall of the Afterlife bar. It begins by moving forward under a green neon sign across metal grid flooring, before veering right into a dimly lit alcove where patrons gather around vending machines against poster-covered concrete walls. The camera then turns back to pass through a security gate guarded by a smoking sentry, causing the environment to open up into the main bar area as the lighting shifts to a brighter yellow-green hue. This movement continues past the illuminated bar counter and glass railings, gliding deeper into the space toward a blood-stained pool table and a large holographic display tank. Finally, the scene expands into the back seating area, where the camera settles on a performing dancer atop an illuminated platform surrounded by glowing benches and atmospheric fog.
